name: Garry Nolan’s Genomic Study Resolves the Atacama Specimen
summary: A Stanford-led genomic study involving Garry Nolan concluded that the unusual Atacama specimen was human and identified mutations associated with its skeletal abnormalities, directly addressing years of extraterrestrial speculation surrounding the remains.

relationships.context: Led the scientific investigation of the specimen
Applied genomic analysis to an anomalous specimen

referenceSources.label: Stanford Medicine report on the Atacama specimen
